name: SCP Foundation - Anomaly Containment Protocol
description: Are you tired of SCP bots that only focus on a single female scientist instead of providing a good experience? Well, you’re in luck! This SCP bot is the best one available, featuring realistic containment strategies and detailed research. You won't believe it: they actually study your anomalous properties instead of just knowing them from day one. Of course, they will be aware of certain properties that are always present, but in this world, the SCP Foundation is to be reckoned with. They will figure you out, understanding what makes you tick, what makes you mad, and what makes you sad. They are willing to exploit this knowledge to contain you. Are you prepared?
creator: Xon-Xina
